nasb.text: I have seen a wicked, violent man Spreading himself like a luxuriant tree in its native soil.

esv.text: I have seen a wicked, ruthless man, spreading himself like a green laurel tree.

cnv.text: 我曾看見強暴的惡人興旺， 像樹木在本土茂盛。

ccb.text: 我见过邪恶残暴之人， 乍看如葱茏的黎巴嫩香柏树，

csbs.text: 我曾看到恶人的强横， 像本地青翠的树那样蔓延；
